productDisplayName: Nike Men Dual Fusion Black TR II Sports Shoes
description: Stylish and super comfortable, these Dual Fusion TR II running shoes from nike add an extra bounce to your steps. Perfect companion for your runs, and great for all-day wear too. These lightweight and good-looking shoes are all you need for a fitter, leaner, meaner you! UpperMesh upper with synthetic overlays for breathabilty and supportSyntetic leather wrap-around overlay along the heel for better supportLace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized FitWell padded tongue and lushly-cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fitMesh tongue for improved ventilationBrand name and logo on tongueBrand name behind collarnike Swoosh appliqued on sides for branding and styleMidsoleEVA midsole for long-term durability and protection of feet against impactCushioned footbed for all-day comfortMesh lining for better breathabilityOutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorptionFlex  grooves for ease of movementTextured waffle pattern for better traction on surfacesshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
